mapper.sql: select o.order_id, o.order_no, o.buyer_id, o.seller_id, o.product_id, o.price, o.status, o.trade_method, o.address, o.meeting_place, o.pay_time, o.create_time, o.update_time, p.title as product_title, p.images as product_images, buyer.nickname as buyer_name, seller.nickname as seller_name from tb_order o left join tb_product p on o.product_id = p.product_id left join tb_user buyer on o.buyer_id = buyer.user_id left join tb_user seller on o.seller_id = seller.user_id
